name: Smooth Reference Sphere
provenance: Synthetic reference sphere (not a specific commercial object), sized to illustrate the smooth-sphere Cd(Re) drag-crisis curve, digitized from standard aerodynamics references, e.g. Hoerner, Fluid-Dynamic Drag (1965); Achenbach, 'Experiments on the flow past spheres at very high Reynolds numbers', J. Fluid Mech. (1972).
